zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Bar於1220年1月25日出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，她的父親Henri II de Bar31歲，母親Philippa de Dreux28歲。她於1240年6月4日與Henri de Luxembourg V在比利時納姆爾利尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年11月23日享年55歲，埋葬在比利時盧布格阿爾隆可萊分泰。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Bar于1220年1月25日出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，她的父亲Henri II de Bar31岁，母亲Philippa de Dreux28岁。她于1240年6月4日与Henri de Luxembourg V在比利时納姆爾利尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1275年11月23日享年55岁，埋葬在比利时盧布格阿爾隆可萊分泰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Bar was born on 25 January 1220, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Henri II de Bar, was 31 and her mother, Philippa de Dreux, was 28. She married Henri de Luxembourg V on 4 June 1240, in Ligny, Namur, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 23 November 1275, at the age of 55, and was buried in Clairefontaine, Arlon, Luxembourg, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Bar est née le 25 janvier 1220, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Henri II de Bar, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Dreux, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Henri de Luxembourg V le 4 juin 1240, à Ligny, Namur, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 novembre 1275, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Clairefontaine, Arlon, Luxembourg, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Bar am 25. Januar 1220 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henri II de Bar 31 und ihre Mutter Philippa de Dreux 28. Sie hat am 4. Juni 1240 in Ligny, Namen, Belgien Henri de Luxembourg V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. November 1275 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Clairefontaine, Arlon, Luxemburg, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bar è nata il il 25 gennaio 1220 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Henri II de Bar, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Philippa de Dreux, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Henri de Luxembourg V il 4 giugno 1240, nel Ligny, Namur, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 23 novembre 1275, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Clairefontaine, Arlon, Lussemburgo, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Barが1220年1月25日にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Henri II de Barは31歳，母Philippa de Dreuxは28歳であった。1240年6月4日にベルギーナムルリグニーでHenri de Luxembourg Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1275年11月23日に55歳で死去し，ベルギールクセンボウルグアルロンクレアイレフォンティアインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Bar(이)가 1220년 1월 25일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henri II de Bar(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa de Dreux(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1240년 6월 4일 벨기에 남어 리그니에서 Henri de Luxembourg V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 11월 23일 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 루세보우르그 알런 클레이레폰테인에 묻혔다.

mn.25 January 1220–23 November 1273 ou 1275: 1220 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 25–1275 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 23

pt.25 January 1220–23 November 1273 ou 1275: 25 de janeiro de 1220–23 de novembro de 1275
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Bar nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1220, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Henri II de Bar, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Dreux, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri de Luxembourg V em 4 de junho de 1240, em Ligny, Namur, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1275, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Clairefontaine, Arlon, Luxemburgo, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Bar родилась 25 января 1220 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Henri II de Bar было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Dreux, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri de Luxembourg V 4 июня 1240 г. в местности лигни, намур, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 23 ноября 1275 г. в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности клерефонтеин, арлон, луксембург, Бельгия.

es.25 January 1220–23 November 1273 ou 1275: 25 de enero de 1220–23 de noviembre de 1275
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Bar nació el 25 de enero de 1220, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Henri II de Bar, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Philippa de Dreux, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Henri de Luxembourg V el 4 de junio de 1240, en Ligny, Namur, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1275, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Clairefontaine, Arlon, Luxemburgo, Bélgica.
